revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-375

1. That portion of the overall radiation pattern of an antenna which is contained within a region bounded by adjacent minima.

2. The radiation within the region as in 1.

{{IALAFooter}}
